stemHtml: One illusion that pilots experience in conditions of fog or mist are that objects appear to be..

options.a: closer than they really are and this can lead to shallow approaches.
options.b: further away than they really are and this can lead to shallow approaches.
options.c: closer than they really are and this can lead to steep approaches.
options.d: further away than they really are and this can lead to steep approaches.
